sentences.text: I feel happy when I spend time with my friends.
My smile becomes wide and bright.
I laugh loudly during fun activities.
My heart feels light and cheerful.
I clap my hands after winning a game.
Happiness spreads quickly to everyone around me.
I feel grateful because life feels joyful.
I feel sad when I miss someone special.
Tears slowly roll down my cheeks.
I sit quietly in a corner.
My voice becomes soft and slow.
My mother hugs me gently.
I talk about my feelings after calming down.
I feel better because someone listens to me.
I feel angry when things do not go well.
My face turns red and serious.
I cross my arms tightly.
I shout loudly before taking deep breaths.
I count slowly to calm myself.
I talk about the problem after relaxing.
I feel peaceful when I control my anger.
I feel excited before going on a trip.
My eyes shine brightly with joy.
I jump happily around the room.
My voice becomes louder than usual.
I smile because something special is coming.
I pack my bag quickly before leaving.
Excitement makes my day more energetic.
I feel scared when the room becomes dark.
My heart beats faster than usual.
I hold my mother's hand tightly.
Strange sounds make me nervous.
I close my eyes before taking deep breaths.
My father switches on the light quickly.
I feel safe again after the fear passes.
I feel surprised when something unexpected happens.
My eyes open wide in shock.
I gasp loudly because I did not expect it.
Everyone laughs at my reaction.
I look around to understand what happened.
The surprise makes the moment exciting.
I enjoy pleasant surprises during celebrations.
I feel tired after playing for a long time.
My legs feel heavy and slow.
I yawn softly while sitting down.
My eyes begin to close gently.
I lie down before falling asleep.
Rest helps my body recover.
I wake up refreshed after good sleep.
I feel proud when I complete my work.
I stand tall with confidence.
My teacher praises me in front of the class.
My parents clap happily at home.
I smile because I worked hard.
Success makes my heart feel strong.
I promise to keep trying my best.
I feel worried before an important test.
My thoughts move quickly inside my mind.
I ask my teacher for help.
My friend encourages me gently.
I study carefully before the exam begins.
Deep breathing helps me relax.
I feel confident after preparing well.
Being kind makes everyone feel happy.
I help my friend when she needs support.
I share my toys without complaining.
I speak politely to everyone.
Kind words make people smile.
I forgive others when they make mistakes.
Kindness makes the world a better place.
